name: gracetree-desktop
description: An Electron application with React and TypeScript
author: example.com

scripts.dev: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const result = spawnSync(process.platform === 'win32' ? 'electron-vite.cmd' : 'electron-vite', ['dev'], { stdio: 'inherit', env: { ...process.env, VITE_CSP_STYLE_EXTRA: \"'unsafe-inline'\", VITE_CSP_CONNECT_EXTRA: 'ws://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:*' }, shell: process.platform === 'win32' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1)"
scripts.build: pnpm typecheck && node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const result = spawnSync(process.platform === 'win32' ? 'electron-vite.cmd' : 'electron-vite', ['build'], { stdio: 'inherit', env: { ...process.env, VITE_CSP_STYLE_EXTRA: '', VITE_CSP_CONNECT_EXTRA: '' }, shell: process.platform === 'win32' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1)"
